creator: gabor@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Helo Denis, 

you should ask about missing drivers or features on the appropriate mailing 
lists, see 
http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo . 
PRs are for more concrete cases, when something doesn't work as expected, but 
in this case, we cannot do anything much with these pieces of information. 

Regards, 
Gabor
